meta.scope: A-layer iPSC suspension/aggregate bioreactor CPP catalog

nodes.label: CPP: pH
nodes.content: A-layer pH setpoint 7.1; L0 local PID maintains, L1 may shift within envelope.

nodes.label: CPP: dissolved oxygen
nodes.content: A-layer DO setpoint 40% -> 10% at high density; L0 local PID with agitation cascade.

nodes.label: CPP: temperature
nodes.content: A-layer temperature setpoint 37 C; L0 local PID.

nodes.label: CPP: agitation rpm
nodes.content: A-layer agitation 50-120 rpm; Borys 2021 optimum 40-60 rpm for Vertical-Wheel iPSC.

nodes.label: CPP: glucose
nodes.content: A-layer glucose >1.5 mM; K_Glc=1.5 mM from Manstein 2021 Table 1; perfusion trigger source.

nodes.label: CPP: lactate
nodes.content: A-layer lactate <50 mM; K_Lac=50 mM from Manstein 2021 Table 1; perfusion trigger source.

nodes.label: CPP: glutamine
nodes.content: A-layer glutamine >0.01 mM; K_Gln=0.01 mM from Manstein 2021 Table 1.

nodes.label: CPP: osmolality
nodes.content: A-layer osmolality <500 mOsm/kg; K_Osm=500 mOsm/kg from Manstein 2021 Table 1; perfusion trigger source.

nodes.label: CPP: ammonia (monitoring)
nodes.content: Ammonia monitoring-only CPP for v1; mammalian toxicity threshold 4-6 mM, iPSC-native threshold not yet established.

nodes.label: CPP: aggregate diameter
nodes.content: A-layer aggregate diameter 150-350 um; Borys 2021 reports >400 um necrosis risk.

nodes.label: CPP: viable cell density
nodes.content: A-layer VCD target ~35e6 cells/mL; measured by in-line capacitance; triggers passage.

nodes.label: CPP: viability
nodes.content: A-layer viability target >90%; primarily BO objective input, not L1 control target.

nodes.label: CPP: perfusion rate
nodes.content: A-layer main actuator 0->7 vvd (Manstein 2021 Table 3); conditionally triggered by glucose/lactate/osmolality.

nodes.label: ramp rate limit
nodes.content: Maximum per-unit-time change for perfusion/agitation/DO setpoints to avoid shear/osmotic shock.

nodes.label: perfusion ramp trigger
nodes.content: L1 rule event that raises perfusion rate when glucose/lactate/osmolality cross thresholds.

nodes.label: Y-27632 ROCK inhibitor
nodes.content: Standard ROCK inhibitor added during dissociation passage to improve iPSC survival.

nodes.label: tool: set_perfusion_rate
nodes.content: LADS controller Function / DomainVertical tool for perfusion rate. Maps to devprofile.

nodes.label: tool: set_agitation_rpm
nodes.content: LADS controller Function / DomainVertical tool for agitation setpoint.

nodes.label: tool: trigger_passage
nodes.content: LADS Program / DomainVertical tool for dissociation passage with Y-27632.

nodes.label: Yehya et al. 2024 (Stem Cell Res Ther)
nodes.content: Vertical-Wheel agitation DoE supporting lower optimum rpm (40-60 rpm).

nodes.label: Xing et al. 2008 (Biotechnol Prog)
nodes.content: CHO osmolality threshold reference; iPSC-native value not established.

nodes.label: Nova BioProfile FLEX2
nodes.content: 16-parameter at-line analyzer for metabolites, osmolality, viability, cell diameter.

sources.title: Yehya et al. 2024, Stem Cell Res Ther 15:191 — Vertical-Wheel agitation DoE (PMC11218057)
Xing et al. 2008, Biotechnol Prog 24:675 — CHO osmolality threshold (PMID 18422365)
Nova Biomedical BioProfile FLEX2 (16-parameter at-line analyzer)
